description: CompositionOrange t-shirt with round neck and bold print across the front, made of 100% cotton Wash care1. Machine wash separately in cold water2. Use mild detergent3. Do not bleach4. Avoid soaking5. Line dry inside out in shade 6. Warm iron only7. Do not iron directly on printFittingRegularDesigned for the gadget-crazy Gen-Y, this orange t-shirt from tantra suits today's gizmo-oriented kids best. Made of pure cotton, the T-shirt will keep your little angel dry and comfortable through all seasons. Team this with denim or cargo shorts or pants and a pair of open sandals to give your child that comfortable, yet stylish look.
